bank_defaults.cash_advance: Transaction fee of 2.5% (Excluding Infinia, Infinia Metal Edition) or ₹500 whichever is higher (Not Applicable for Paytm HDFC Bank Digital Credit Card and Micro Enterprise Card as cash withdrawal is not allowed)
bank_defaults.cash_interest: All cash advances also carry a finance charge equal to charges on revolving credit (Refer schedule of charges) from the date of withdrawal until the date of full payment. Finance charges on cash advances are applicable from the date of transaction until the payment is made in full.
bank_defaults.interest_free_days: The interest free credit period could range from 20 to 50 days (up to 50 days)
bank_defaults.source_section: Section: Fees and Charges - Cash advance fee (p.7), Finance charges for both revolving credit and cash advances (p.10), Interest free (grace Period) (p.10), Late Payment Charges table (p.13/p.38). Finance-charge variant table: Infinia, Infinia (Metal Edition), Diners Black Metal Edition, Diners Black, BizBlack Metal Card = 1.99% pm / 23.88% pa; All other variants = 3.75% pm / 45.0% pa; Micro Enterprise Card = 1.5% pm / 18% pa; FD-linked cards carry same rate as respective variant
